---
title: "Analysis 3: Variability as a function of age, site, and category"
format: html
---
```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(performance)

d <- read_csv("../data/distance_cat_site.csv") |>
  mutate(
    log_dist = log(distance_cat_site),
    age_c = age - mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    site = factor(location),
    category = factor(drawing_category),
    child_id = factor(participant_id)
  )

```

```{r eda-check}
# confirm log transform handled skew
library(moments)
skewness(d$distance_cat_site, na.rm = TRUE)
skewness(d$log_dist, na.rm = TRUE)

# cell sizes
d |> count(site, category, age) |> summary()

# number of drawings per child
d |> count(child_id) |> summary()
```

## random-effects structure

Fit with REML, minimal fixed effects (intercept + centered age).
```{r phase1-models}
r0 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + (1 | child_id), data = d, REML = TRUE)

r1 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category), data = d, REML = TRUE)

r2 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + (1 | child_id) + (age_c | category), data = d, REML = TRUE)

# fallback if r2 fails to converge: uncorrelated random effects
r2_uncorr <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category),
                   data = d, REML = TRUE)
```


```{r phase1-compare}
# ICC from intercept-only model
r0_null <- lmer(log_dist ~ 1 + (1 | child_id), data = d, REML = TRUE)
icc(r0_null)

# compare random structures
anova(r0, r1)
anova(r1, r2)
anova(r1, r2_uncorr)

# AIC/BIC summary
AIC(r0, r1, r2, r2_uncorr)
BIC(r0, r1, r2, r2_uncorr)
```


```{r phase1-convergence}
# check for convergence warnings and boundary estimates
lapply(list(r0 = r0, r1 = r1, r2 = r2, r2_uncorr = r2_uncorr), function(m) {
  vc <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(m))
  list(
    converged = length(m@optinfo$conv$lme4) == 0,
    var_components = vc
  )
})
```


```{r phase1-select}
# set the best random-effects structure here after inspecting above
# replace with r0, r1, r2, or r2_uncorr as appropriate
best_re <- "r2_uncorr"
cat("Selected random-effects structure:", best_re, "\n")
```

## fixed effects

Fit with ML for likelihood ratio tests on fixed effects. #TODO

```{r fixed-models}
# random-effects structure from Phase 1: r2_uncorr
# (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category)

re <- "(1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category)"

f0 <- lmer(log_dist ~ 1 + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category),
           data = d, REML = FALSE)

f1 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category),
           data = d, REML = FALSE)

f2 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + site + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category),
           data = d, REML = FALSE)

f3 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c * site + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category),
           data = d, REML = FALSE)

f4 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c * site + category + (1 | child_id) + (0 + age_c | category),
           data = d, REML = FALSE)
```

```{r check-singularity}
lapply(list(f1 = f1, f2 = f2, f3 = f3, f4 = f4), function(m) {
  vc <- as.data.frame(VarCorr(m))
  list(singular = isSingular(m), var_components = vc)
})
```

```{r fixed-compare}
anova(f0, f1)
anova(f1, f2)
anova(f2, f3)
anova(f3, f4)
```

```{r category-level age slopes}
# extract random slopes of age by category from f1 (or f2, same RE structure)
re_cat <- ranef(f2)$category
re_cat$category <- rownames(re_cat)

# the random slope is the deviation from the fixed age effect
fixef_age <- fixef(f2)["age_c"]
re_cat$total_slope <- fixef_age + re_cat$age_c

ggplot(re_cat, aes(x = reorder(category, total_slope), y = total_slope)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = fixef_age, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Age slope (fixed + random)",
       title = "Category-level developmental trajectories",
       subtitle = "Dashed = grand mean age slope; dotted = zero")
```

```{r fixed-summary}
f4_clean <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + site + category + (1 | child_id) + (0 + age_c | category),
                 data = d, REML = FALSE)
f2_ml <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + site + (1 | child_id) + (1 | category) + (0 + age_c | category),
              data = d, REML = FALSE)
anova(f2_ml, f4_clean)

# refit final model with REML for unbiased estimates
f_final <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c + site + category + (1 | child_id) + (0 + age_c | category),
                data = d, REML = TRUE)
summary(f_final)
```
```{r plotting-age}
ggplot(d, aes(x = age, y = log_dist)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point") +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "line") +
  facet_wrap(~category) +
  labs(x = "Age", y = "log(Distance to centroid)")
```


## Diagnostics
```{r diagnostics, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
par(mfrow = c(2, 2))

# residuals vs fitted
plot(fitted(f_final), residuals(f_final),
     xlab = "Fitted", ylab = "Residuals", main = "Residuals vs Fitted")
abline(h = 0, lty = 2)

# QQ plot of residuals
qqnorm(residuals(f_final), main = "QQ: Residuals")
qqline(residuals(f_final))

# QQ plot of random effects (child)
re_child <- ranef(f_final)$child_id[, 1]
qqnorm(re_child, main = "QQ: Child random intercepts")
qqline(re_child)

# QQ plot of random effects (category)
re_cat_slope <- ranef(f_final)$category[, 1]
qqnorm(re_cat_slope, main = "QQ: Category random slopes")
qqline(re_cat_slope)
```

```{r vif}
# VIF for the interaction model
library(car)
vif(f_final)
```

## Exploratory: three-way interaction
```{r f5-exploratory}
f5 <- lmer(log_dist ~ age_c * site * category + (1 | child_id),
           data = d, REML = FALSE)

anova(f4_clean, f5)
```

```{r plot}
# extract fixed effects
fe <- fixef(f_final)

# create prediction grid
pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  age_c = seq(min(d$age_c), max(d$age_c), length.out = 50),
  site = levels(d$site)
)

# build prediction: intercept + age slope + site offset
pred_grid$predicted <- fe["(Intercept)"] + 
  fe["age_c"] * pred_grid$age_c

# add site offsets (reference level gets 0)
ref_level <- levels(d$site)[1]
for (s in levels(d$site)) {
  if (s != ref_level) {
    coef_name <- paste0("site", s)
    pred_grid$predicted[pred_grid$site == s] <- 
      pred_grid$predicted[pred_grid$site == s] + fe[coef_name]
  }
}

# convert back to raw age
mean_age <- mean(d$age, na.rm = TRUE)
pred_grid$age <- pred_grid$age_c + mean_age

ggplot(pred_grid, aes(x = age, y = predicted, color = site)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "log(Distance to centroid)", color = "Site") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r expo}
pred_grid$predicted_raw <- exp(pred_grid$predicted)

ggplot(pred_grid, aes(x = age, y = predicted_raw, color = site)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(x = "Age (years)", y = "Distance to centroid", color = "Site") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Bootstrap CIs for final model
```{r bootstrap, cache=TRUE}
# bootstrapped 95% CIs for fixed effects of final model
boot_ci <- confint(f_final, method = "boot", nsim = 1000, seed = 57)
boot_ci
```
